faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Massapequa Park homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and areas with standing water. In Massapequa Park, common causes include infrequently used bathroom drains, basement floor drains, kitchen sink pipes, and air conditioning condensation lines. The humid Long Island climate can exacerbate moisture problems that attract drain flies.
